name: calm
msgOff: You have lost your peace of mind.

name: detect evil
msgOff: The red in your vision disappears.

name: detect good
msgOff: The gold in your vision disappears.

name: detect hidden
msgOff: You feel less aware of your surroundings.

name: detect invis
msgOff: You no longer see invisible objects.

name: faerie fire
msgOff: The pink aura around you fades away.

name: fly
msgOff: You slowly float to the ground.

name: infravision
msgOff: You no longer see in the dark.

name: sanctuary
msgOff: The white aura around your body fades.

name: shield
msgOff: Your force shield shimmers then fades away.

name: berserk
msgOff: You feel your pulse slow down.

name: dirt kicking
msgOff: You rub the dirt out of your eyes.
